name: Tenali Rama
overview: After two years, a visit from Goddess Kali, warning him of the danger that looms over Vijayanagar, spurs Tenali Rama into returning to the kingdom. However, in a land where the king and the people have lost their trust in him, Tenali's journey is filled with obstacles. Can he rise to the challenge and save Vijayanagar from the brink of disaster?

trailers.title: Aa raha hai Bhartiya Itihaas ka Maharatna...TENALI RAMA | STARTS 16th DECEMBER | 8 PM | Sony SAB
